overall.summary: Overall score uses minimum dimension score 4 capped by highest severity HIGH.

proposal_semantics.proposal_summary: This proposal funds the operational costs of the Aave Robot with LINK tokens to automate permissionless actions in Aave Governance v2, and reimburses BGD Labs for previous operational expenses.

disclosed_entities.name: BGD Labs
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: This proposal also reimburses BGD Labs for the LINK spent previously on the Aave Robot.

disclosed_entities.name: Aave Collector contract
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: from the Aave Collector contract which will help to perform automation

disclosed_entities.name: Short Executor / Bridge Executor
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: from the collector contract across Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism networks to the short Executor / Bridge Executor.

disclosed_entities.name: PegSwap
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: the payload swaps it one-to-one using PegSwap to the ERC-677 LINK token.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Move tokens from collector contract across networks to the Short/Bridge Executor.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: This proposal will transfer a total of: 1275 aLINK (~ $7500) from the collector contract across Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism networks to the short Executor / Bridge Executor.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Convert aLINK to standard LINK tokens on Executors.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: On the Short Executor / Bridge Executor, the aLINK tokens transferred will be withdrawn to the LINK tokens.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Fill the keeper contract to pay for automated operations.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Out of all the LINK tokens received, 675 LINK will be used to fund the pre-registered robot using the Aave CL Robot Operator contract by calling the refillKeeper() method.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Reimburse BGD Labs for prior expenses.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Once the keeper is refilled, a total of 600 LINK will be transferred to BGD labs for their previous spending on the Aave Robot for operational expenses.

claimed_complexity.reason: Includes multi-chain asset transfers, standard withdrawals, a specific peg swap on Polygon, and automated keeper funding through an operator contract.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: This proposal will transfer a total of: 1275 aLINK (~ $7500) from the collector contract across Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism networks... In the case of Polygon... the payload swaps it one-to-one using PegSwap to the ERC-677 LINK token.

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: such as queue(), cancel(), and execute() need to be called
such as queue(), cancel(), and execute() need to be called
such as queue(), cancel(), and execute() need to be called

limitations: We don't know the addresses for PegSwap, the collector contract, or BGD Labs' multi-sig from the text alone, though some guardian and operator addresses are specified.

conflict_detection.summary: Execution includes undisclosed path components, but core business actions match proposal text.

findings.title: Unaccounted trace addresses
findings.description: One or more addresses appeared in the trace without direct proposal text disclosure.
findings.recommendation: Review undisclosed execution path components, but prioritize whether the core business action remains covered by proposal text.

depth_analysis.summary: Observed trace depth exceeds claimed complexity.

findings.title: Trace complexity exceeds textual complexity disclosure
findings.description: Observed trace depth exceeds claimed complexity.
findings.recommendation: Review whether the proposal text should describe the actual call depth or indirect execution paths.

claimed_complexity.reason: Includes multi-chain asset transfers, standard withdrawals, a specific peg swap on Polygon, and automated keeper funding through an operator contract.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: This proposal will transfer a total of: 1275 aLINK (~ $7500) from the collector contract across Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism networks... In the case of Polygon... the payload swaps it one-to-one using PegSwap to the ERC-677 LINK token.

function_semantic_match.summary: Claimed business action categories differ from extracted business actions.

findings.title: Claimed actions do not fully match trace actions
findings.description: Claimed business action categories differ from extracted business actions.
findings.recommendation: Compare proposal action wording with decoded functions and risk actions before relying on the text.
